ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data */,
  "last_collection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each README file */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the README file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the README file in MB */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the README file was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the README file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station_data" (
  "station_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_station_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_data" (
  "source_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)
